overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit haunted mansion interior in a horror game. The player moves through a green-walled Victorian room with a creature climbing the wall, then transitions to a grand stone hall with a throne-like area. Atmospheric lighting with candles and lamps creates a suspenseful mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: haunted mansion room with climbing creature

events.description: camera approaches closer to the creature climbing the left wall
camera passes the creature and continues toward the double doors

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dimly lit room, observing the creature on the wall and examining the surroundings

notable_agents.action: large dark creature climbing up the green wall, remaining stationary as the player passes by

entered.detail: wooden door frame marking the entrance to the room
dark green textured wallpaper covering the walls
patterned tile flooring with geometric designs
dark wooden beams and panels on the ceiling
large dark humanoid creature climbing the wall
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books
large carved wooden double doors with wall sconces on either side

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit Victorian-style room with green wallpaper and patterned tile floors. A large dark creature climbs the left wall while the player walks past wooden bookshelves and benches toward ornate double doors at the far end. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with candlelight illuminating the space.

events.description: abrupt transition from the green room to a large stone hall with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and walking toward the central throne platform

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to a platform with golden gates
ornate circular chandelier hanging from the high ceiling
large stone tile flooring with blue decorative rugs
lit torches and wall-mounted candles providing warm light
elevated platform with golden barred gates at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vast stone hall with high ceilings and a grand staircase leading to a throne platform. The architecture shifts from wooden Victorian to stone Gothic style. The player walks across the stone floor toward the illuminated golden gates at the far end, passing beneath a large ornate chandelier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic Victorian parlor into a vast, imposing Gothic hall. It begins in a dimly lit room with green wallpaper and patterned tile floors, moving past wooden bookshelves and benches while a large dark creature climbs the left wall. As the camera approaches and passes through ornate double doors, the intimate wooden interior gives way to a grand stone hall characterized by high ceilings and a massive ornate chandelier. The scene then expands across the cold stone floor toward a grand staircase and a throne platform, finally advancing toward illuminated golden gates at the far end of the chamber.
